source_text: Passwords must be created to ensure they are difficult to guess or compromise.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Complex Characters' is set to 'Digits and lowercase letters are required'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Length' is set to '14 or more character(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Minimum Password Age' is set to '1 or more day(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Alphanumeric Device Password Required' is set to 'Password or Alphanumeric PIN required'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Do not display the password reveal button' is set to 'Enabled'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Admin Templates - Windows Components (4.11) - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: All passwords must be unique to each system and must not be reused across different services.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Deny Log On As Service Job' to include 'Guests'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) User Rights (89) - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Passwords must remain confidential and must not be shared with any other individual, including IT personnel.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Do not allow passwords to be saved' is set to 'Enabled'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Admin Templates - Windows Components (4.11) - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Passwords must not be stored in plain text (digitally or physically) unless protected by approved secure storage mechanisms such as password managers.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Do not display the password reveal button' is set to 'Enabled'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Admin Templates - Windows Components (4.11) - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Notify Unsafe App' is set to 'Enabled'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Section 15 - 104 - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Passwords must have a minimum length of twelve characters.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Complex Characters' is set to 'Digits and lowercase letters are required'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Length' is set to '14 or more character(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Minimum Password Age' is set to '1 or more day(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Passwords must include a combination of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Complex Characters' is set to 'Digits and lowercase letters are required'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Length' is set to '14 or more character(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Alphanumeric Device Password Required' is set to 'Password or Alphanumeric PIN required'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Where systems allow, passphrases should be at least sixteen characters and composed of multiple unrelated words combined with numbers or special characters.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Length' is set to '14 or more character(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Complex Characters' is set to 'Digits and lowercase letters are required'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Users must not reuse previous passwords; the organization will enforce controls to prevent reuse of at least the last ten passwords.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Minimum Password Age' is set to '1 or more day(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Device Password History' is set to '24 or more password(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Autopilot - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Device Password Expiration' is set to '365 or fewer days, but not 0'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Do not allow passwords to be saved' is set to 'Enabled'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Admin Templates - Windows Components (4.11) - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Notify Password Reuse' is set to 'Enabled'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Section 15 - 104 - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Standard user accounts must update their passwords at least every ninety days.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Minimum Password Age' is set to '1 or more day(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Device Password Expiration' is set to '365 or fewer days, but not 0'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Device Password History' is set to '24 or more password(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Autopilot - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Privileged accounts must be updated every sixty days.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Minimum Password Age' is set to '1 or more day(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Device Password Expiration' is set to '365 or fewer days, but not 0'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Passwords must be changed immediately if there is any suspicion that they have been compromised.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Minimum Password Age' is set to '1 or more day(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Device Password Expiration' is set to '365 or fewer days, but not 0'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Multi-factor authentication is required for access to sensitive systems, remote access services, and all privileged accounts.
Accounts will be automatically locked after five failed login attempts.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Account Logon Logoff Audit Account Lockout' is set to include 'Failure'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Auditing (6) - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Max Device Password Failed Attempts' is set to '5 or fewer failed attempt(s), but not 0'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: After lockout, the account will be locked for a minimum of fifteen minutes.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Max Device Password Failed Attempts' is set to '5 or fewer failed attempt(s), but not 0'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Max Inactivity Time Device Lock' is set to '15 or fewer minutes, but not 0'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Account Logon Logoff Audit Account Lockout' is set to include 'Failure'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Auditing (6) - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Device Password Expiration' is set to '365 or fewer days, but not 0'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: User sessions must be automatically terminated after fifteen minutes of inactivity.
Passwords must not be stored in plain text; they must be protected using strong cryptographic hashing algorithms such as bcrypt or Argon2.
Passwords must only be transmitted over secure channels that provide encryption.
Privileged accounts must use stronger passwords with a minimum length of sixteen characters.

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Complex Characters' is set to 'Digits and lowercase letters are required'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Device Password Enabled: Min Device Password Length' is set to '14 or more character(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

cis_matches.cis_title: (L1) Ensure 'Minimum Password Age' is set to '1 or more day(s)'
cis_matches.policy_name: CIS (L1) Device Lock & WHFB - Windows 11 Intune 4.0.0

source_text: Shared use of privileged accounts is not permitted.
